name: mentat-run-isolation
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq shellcheck && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
postCreateCommand: cd /workspaces/mentat-run-isolation && ~/.local/bin/uv sync --group dev && npm install -g promptfoo lefthook && (lefthook install --force || true) && python3 .agents/skills/mentat-install/scripts/install.py
